title: Two bright white dot-like UFOs reported in Curitiba-PR [1994]

text_preview: JULY 21st, 1994. Time: 9:51 pm. Duration: Not determined. A couple in the region of Prado Velho, Curitiba, State of Paraná, reported a sighting of two unidentified flying objects in the shape of “bright white dots (like stars), one small and the other large”. According to the witnesses’ reports, as collected by the COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], the objects flew slowly and came to be at a distance of “6 meters in relation to the observer” and followed in a straight path. Also according to the report, the sighting occurred at a moment when one of the witnesses contacted the Air
summary: A couple in Prado Velho, Curitiba reported two bright white dot-like UFOs flying slowly at close range with no radar detection on July 21, 1994.
